title: EN 1993-1-1 Steel Member Design
description: Design standard and custom steel members in accordance with EN 1993-1-1.

annex.description: National Annex. Symbol: Annex. National Annex applied to calculations.

section.description: Section. Symbol: Section. Select Custom to edit section dimensions.

steel_grade.description: Grade. Symbol: Grade. Select Custom to edit section yield strength. Grades are assumed to be EN 10025-2 for Hot-Rolled Sections EN 10210-1 for Hollow Sections.

fabrication.description: Fabrication. Symbol: Fabrication. Choose section fabrication method.

classification.description: Classification. Symbol: Class. Section Classification is calculated based on applied loading by default. Use this input to manually assign a classification.

d_input.description: d. Symbol: d. Units: mm. Total height (or diameter) of section.

b_input.description: b. Symbol: b. Units: mm. Total width of section.

t_f_input.description: tf. Symbol: t_f. Units: mm. Flange thickness, or top/btm wall thickness (RHS/SHS) or CHS thickness.

t_w_input.description: tw. Symbol: t_w. Units: mm. Web thickness, or side wall thickness (RHS/SHS).

r_input.description: r. Symbol: r. Units: mm. Fillet radius.

F_y_flange_input.description: fy.flange. Symbol: f_{y.f}. Units: MPa. Flange yield strength (open sections) or section yield strength (hollow sections).

F_u_flange_input.description: fu.flange. Symbol: f_{u.f}. Units: MPa. Flange tensile strength (open sections) or section tensile strength (hollow sections).

F_y_web_input.description: fy.web. Symbol: f_{y.w}. Units: MPa. Web yield strength.

F_u_web_input.description: fu.web. Symbol: f_{u.w}. Units: MPa. Web tensile strength.

cm_method.description: Cm Factors. Symbol: C<sub>m</sub> \; Method. Select between conservative (Cm = 1.0) or user-defined equivalent uniform moment factors (Table B.2).

c_mz.description: Cmz. Symbol: C_{mz}. Equivalent uniform moment factor for buckling about the Z-axis.

c_my.description: Cmy. Symbol: C_{my}. Equivalent uniform moment factor for buckling about the Y-axis.

c_mLT.description: CmLT. Symbol: C_{mLT}. Equivalent uniform moment factor for lateral-torsional buckling.

restraint.description: Torsional Restraint. Symbol: Restraint. Select whether segment is restrained against lateral-torsional and torsional-flexural bucking along its length.

L_z_flexure_input.description: Lz.flexure. Symbol: L_{z.flexure}. Units: mm. Distance between intermediate or end flexural restraints in the minor axis (Z) direction.

C1_input.description: C1. Symbol: C_{1}. Lateral-torsional buckling modification factor. Taking C1 = 1.0 is conservative.

L_z_comp_input.description: Lz.comp. Symbol: L_{z.comp}. Units: mm. Distance between restraints against compression buckling about the Z-axis.

L_y_comp_input.description: Ly.comp. Symbol: L_{y.comp}. Units: mm. Distance between restraints against compression buckling about the Y-axis.

ke_z_input.description: ke.z. Symbol: k_{e.z}. Effective length factor for compression buckling about the Z-axis. BS 5950 suggested values displayed below.

ke_y_input.description: ke.y. Symbol: k_{e.y}. Effective length factor for compression buckling about the Y-axis. BS 5950 suggested values displayed below.

M_fz_input.description: Mz,Ed. Symbol: M_{z,Ed}. Units: kN*m. Major (Z) Axis Factored Moment. Positive value results in compression at top of section.

M_fy_input.description: My,Ed. Symbol: M_{y,Ed}. Units: kN*m. Minor (Y) Axis Factored Moment. Positive value results in compression at right of section.

V_fy_input.description: Vy,Ed. Symbol: V_{y,Ed}. Units: kN. Y-Direction Factored Shear Force.

V_fz_input.description: Vz,Ed. Symbol: V_{z,Ed}. Units: kN. Z-Direction Factored Shear Force.

N_f_input.description: NEd. Symbol: N_{Ed}. Units: kN. Factored Axial (X) Force. Positive value represents compression.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
